title: Hiring Movers
scene: 你打电话咨询搬家公司报价。

turns.cn: 搬家公司，请问从哪搬到哪？
turns.en: Moving company. Where are you moving from and to?

turns.cn: 两居室，同城五英里，有电梯。
turns.en: Two-bedroom, five miles across town, both buildings have elevators.

turns.cn: 大概多少箱子和家具？
turns.en: Roughly how many boxes and pieces of furniture?

turns.cn: 三十箱，一张沙发和床。
turns.en: About thirty boxes, a sofa, and a bed.

turns.cn: 报价六百到八百，含车和人。
turns.en: Quote is six to eight hundred, including truck and crew.

turns.cn: 包拆装吗？有保险吗？
turns.en: Does that include assembly? Is there insurance?

turns.cn: 基本险包含，拆装另加一百。
turns.en: Basic insurance is included. Assembly is a hundred extra.

title: Moving Day
scene: 搬家工人到了，你指挥摆放家具。

turns.cn: 沙发放客厅还是楼上？
turns.en: Should the sofa go in the living room or upstairs?

turns.cn: 客厅靠窗，床放主卧。
turns.en: Living room by the window. Bed in the master bedroom.

turns.cn: 这个衣柜要拆门才能进。
turns.en: We'll need to take the closet doors off to fit this in.

turns.cn: 可以，小心别刮墙。
turns.en: That's fine. Please be careful not to scratch the walls.

turns.cn: 放心。小费包含在账单里吗？
turns.en: No problem. Is gratuity included in the bill?

turns.cn: 现金另给，你们辛苦了。
turns.en: I'll tip in cash. Thanks for the hard work.

turns.cn: 谢谢，欢迎检查有没有遗漏。
turns.en: Thank you. Let us know if anything's missing.

title: Renting a Truck
scene: 你自己租车搬家，在柜台办手续。

turns.cn: 租多大的车？搬多远？
turns.en: What size truck? How far are you moving?

turns.cn: 十五英尺的，同城当天来回。
turns.en: Fifteen-foot, same city, back today.

turns.cn: 里程一百英里内包油，超了每迈零点九九。
turns.en: Fuel is included up to a hundred miles. After that it's ninety-nine cents a mile.

turns.cn: 需要买额外保险吗？
turns.en: Should I buy extra insurance?

turns.cn: 您的车险若涵盖可不买。
turns.en: If your auto policy covers rentals, you can skip it.

turns.cn: 还要租手推车吗？
turns.en: Should I rent a dolly too?

turns.cn: 建议租一个，七块钱。
turns.en: I'd recommend one. Seven dollars.

title: Change of Address
scene: 搬家后你去邮局和银行改地址。

turns.cn: 我搬家了，要更新账户地址。
turns.en: I moved and need to update my account address.

turns.cn: 请填这张表，带新地址证明。
turns.en: Please fill out this form with proof of your new address.

turns.cn: 水电账单可以吗？
turns.en: Will a utility bill work?

turns.cn: 可以，三个月内的。
turns.en: Yes, from within the last three months.

turns.cn: 支票和卡会寄到新地址吗？
turns.en: Will checks and cards go to the new address?

turns.cn: 对，七到十个工作日更新。
turns.en: Yes. It updates in seven to ten business days.

turns.cn: 谢谢。
turns.en: Thank you.
